network_summary: Webster Dental Care is a documented, multi-location dental service organization (DSO) founded in 1976 by Dr. Steven Rempas, operating 12+ locations across Chicagoland under the consumer brand 'Webster Dental Care' and supported by a management company entity (Webster Dental Management / websterdentalmanagement.com). The organization is dentist-owned (two dentists, per public reporting) with no private equity backing found. MANISSA LAMPMAN appears as the authorized official on NPPES records for two Webster Dental Care locations (Glenview LTD and Sauganash LTD) and is most likely an administrative, credentialing, or operations officer for the DSO — not the owner. The Glenview location (60025) does not appear on the current Webster Dental Care website and may be closed or relocated; the Sauganash location (60646) is confirmed active on webdentalchicago.com.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Steven Rempas DDS, Founder & President, Webster Dental Care (founded 1976); Michael Errin Rios, CEO (as of 2020). MANISSA LAMPMAN is the NPPES authorized official — likely an administrative/credentialing contact, not the beneficial owner.
durable_artifacts: Shared authorized official MANISSA LAMPMAN on NPI 1619431871 (Glenview) and NPI 1639658917 (Sauganash)
Both NPPES entities named under the 'Webster Dental Care' brand umbrella
Webster Dental Management management company footprint confirmed at websterdentalmanagement.com (footer link + Careers listings)
PR Newswire press release (2020) explicitly describes Webster Dental Care as 'an industry leading dental service organization with over 12 locations'
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Webster Dental Management is the management/MSO entity operating behind the Webster Dental Care consumer brand. The management company is referenced in the footer of webdentalchicago.com with a link to the leadership team at websterdentalmanagement.com. PR Newswire press release (https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/webster-dental-care-announces-new-interim-chief-executive-officer-301139244.html) describes Webster Dental Care as 'an industry leading dental service organization' with a CEO (Michael Errin Rios) appointed in 2020, separate from founder/president Dr. Steven Rempas — confirming a DSO/management-company layer. No PE backing found; public reporting (Crain's Chicago Business, 2018; GDN 2018) explicitly states the DSO is 'owned by two dentists, without any venture capital partners.'
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The Glenview location (WEBSTER DENTAL CARE GLENVIEW, LTD, 1775 Glenview Rd, ZIP 60025, NPI 1619431871) does NOT appear on the current webdentalchicago.com locations page (which lists 8 active locations as of 2026). Established per NPPES as 1946 (likely the predecessor practice date). May be a closed or relocated legacy location. Stale/closed status should be verified. The Sauganash location (4801 W Peterson Ave, ZIP 60646) IS confirmed active on the website.
evidence_chain: AO signal: MANISSA LAMPMAN is the NPPES authorized official on 2 watched IL GP location-NPIs across 2 ZIPs (60025 Glenview, 60646 Chicago/Sauganash), both named 'WEBSTER DENTAL CARE [Location], LTD'. Documentary corroboration: (1) webdentalchicago.com confirms Webster Dental Care as a multi-location Chicagoland dental group operating under a unified brand; (2) the site footer links to websterdentalmanagement.com confirming an MSO/management-company layer; (3) PR Newswire (2020) explicitly describes Webster Dental Care as 'an industry leading dental service organization with over 12 locations' with a separately appointed CEO; (4) Crain's Chicago Business (2018) and GDN (2018) profile Dr. Steven Rempas as founder/owner expanding a dentist-owned DSO. No PE backing. Tier: branded_dso with pe_backed=false.
future_app_notes: 1. Verify whether the Glenview LTD location (60025) is still active — it is absent from the current website; may warrant a stale/closed flag or duplicate_location review. 2. Confirm Manissa Lampman's exact role (administrative director, credentialing officer, or practice administrator) — she is not the DSO founder/owner. 3. Webster Dental Care has 12+ locations; only 2 are in the watched-IL universe here — other Webster locations (Lakeview 60657, Edison Park 60631, Portage Park 60641, Skokie 60077, etc.) may have separate NPPES NPIs that are already classified corporate or could be classified on next sweep. 4. The DSO is explicitly non-PE, dentist-owned — flag pe_backed=false durably.
